_description: Prohibited terms extracted from Knowledge-Base/compliance/eeoc-guidelines.md for automated compliance scanning of ad copy. Terms are case-insensitive. Some terms are only prohibited in specific contexts (noted in 'context' field).
_usage: Scan all headlines and descriptions against these terms. Flag any matches for review. Context-dependent terms require additional analysis.

context_dependent.note: Acceptable if describing role demands without age implication

exceptions: Government positions may require citizenship - verify on a case-by-case basis

religion_discrimination.note: Religious requirements only valid as BFOQ for religious organizations

prohibited_phrases: must be able to stand for
disability_discrimination.note: Physical requirements only valid if essential function of the role

coded_language.note: These terms can mask bias and should be flagged for human review

patterns.excessive_caps: Three or more consecutive uppercase words (e.g., APPLY NOW TODAY)
patterns.excessive_punctuation: Two or more consecutive identical punctuation marks (e.g., !!, ???)
patterns.emoji: Any emoji characters in text ads
